subject: there is a BBB in Paris!
body:
Hi Jeffrey.  Barbro just called me here at home.  She said there is a
BBB in Paris.  Her name is Maria Londen and she thinks you would really
enjoy meeting her.  Her number is (01133643080070))  Barbro said she has
applied for Female Economist of the Year.  
 
Also, Barbro has called a few people in stockholm and said she could
arrange something for you but it was a big holiday on Wednesday and
people are pretty spread out.  If you do go to Stockholm, she says you
should stay at the King Carl Hotel (young and fun). 
 
Barbro is at home and can be reached at 212 288 3210.
 
Have fun!  
 
Les
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
Lesley Groff
Executive Assistant to Jeffrey Epstein
